summary: FQ-09U1 adaptive context music foundation: the game now plays its operator-approved adaptive score live. Gates cleared: operator listening approval ('Music is beautiful') and the Godot 4.6 spike executed in-lane (headless ClassDB probe of the production binary for the exact AudioStreamInteractive/PlaybackInteractive/Synchronized API surface, plus the in-smoke live proof fq09u1_live_clip_switch showing a next-bar same-position crossfade genuinely reaching the requested clip during real playback). Shipped: a dedicated manifest loader (OGGs via AudioStreamOggVorbis.load_from_file - no import pass - with the 72/4/64 musical grid stamped per stream), the AdaptiveMusicDirector scene under Main (one AudioStreamInteractive, four named context clips, any->clip next-bar same-position 1-bar crossfades with crisis entry at next-beat, runtime-created Music bus), context resolution from existing game truth on a 0.5s poll plus the settlement updated signal (pressure = max(threat/40, load/100, inverse health) + storm bonus; priority crisis > underground > surface_night > surface_day; hysteresis 0.60/2s enter, 0.35/6s exit; one-bar min hold; no re-requests), a deterministic evaluate(state, delta) core driven directly by tests, silent-safe missing-asset behavior, and transient music state (zero save keys). Suite 217 -> 226 (9 fq09u1_* checks); haiku verifier NO FINDINGS. The Synchronized-inside-Interactive nesting question is reserved as FQ-09U2's opening spike.
scope: FQ-09U1 only per docs/WORK_ORDER_FQ_09U_ADAPTIVE_MUSIC.md - full-mix context loops, no stems, no stingers, no settings UI, no M8str0 changes, no save-schema or gameplay-determinism impact.
next_action: FQ-09U2: settlement-responsive stem layering, opening with the Synchronized-inside-Interactive nesting spike.
